ItacPersonItem.Notes: Aurora Sanseverino Gaetano married Nicola Dell`Aquila D`Aragona. In 1695 she became a member of the Arcadia Academy in Rome under the pseudonym of Lucinda Coritesia.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
